column1: Models are coming together. Here are my Wednesday evening thoughts on our developing tropical system. [VIDEO]
My husband took this picture this evening before the rain hit Inverness
OmG great capture!!
- wow!
But can I walk my dog at 7:34 pm Monday?? 🤣
Only if there’s heat lightning & you’re drinking Diet Dr Pepper
I'd get out there at 7:15🥴
Will it be enough rain to fill a swimming pool? Asking for a friend…

Being a Floridian we don't recommend doctors we recommend whether people lol
I'm like you should be listening to Dennis Phillips talking like he lives next door to me 😉
Thank you for being all of our neighbors 🙏💕 you're appreciated!
Well the new rule #7 tumbler will get a workout this weekend with Mr. Jameson and Mrs. Ginger Ale 😀
Celebrating a birthday Saturday at Epcot. Not gonna change plans. Thank you.
Have a blast!
We will be there too! Enjoy!!!

seriously not looking good for my neighborhood with a stall out producing high rains totals and IF it goes back out in the gulf and brings surge as well...we are not put back together in my complex after idalia took out 40% of the units last year. praying this just doesn't happen.
Denis Phillips, if the projected path verifies, would there be a risk of storm surge or coastal flooding in the Bay Area?
Thank you Denis! I appreciate the TRUTH you bring to us. 🙏

Thanks Dennis! My kids and I have a flight back to FL landing around 3pm on Sunday at PIE and as a newer Floridian who hates to fly, this is a nail biter! Thank you for keeping us updated and helping me to not freak out 😆 I'll be checking your posts frequently over the next few days. We appreciate you! 👏

I remember one hurricane a while back where Denis camped out in the studio for a few days without shaving
He looked like the wolfman. Pretty cool.
OMG just great...leaving on my first cruise Sunday from Tampa to Key West and Cozumel 😬
You’ll be rockin’nRollin’
hopefully only in a good way...going on the new Margaritaville cruise!
we totally loved the Margaritaville ship!! Start your motion meds a couple days before you go and have a blast!🌊⛴️🍹🩴
I think I'd be getting a scopolamine patch to wear.
my 1st cruise was during a hurricane. Get the motion sickness patch!! Everyone on the boat, including me, was so sick! You'll thank me later! Enjoy the cruise!!
Gotta move someone out of FGCU dorms Saturday. Love hearing the word "dry"!
Absolutely adore your dedication and demeanor. I mean it. You are a Godsend, and you keep my “freakoutability” to near zero. Thank you! 💕
What if we are leaving Saturday night from Tampa?
watch the video. Your exact question is answered.
thank you! sorry I didn’t get to finish listening to it trying to get kids to bed.
yeah you'll be fine 🙂
Thank you Dennis for always being there to give us consistent updates on the storm!! I hope you get some much needed rest after today!
Flying into Tampa aug 4th from MD, it’s a night flight take off about b9:30. We are staying at Maria island until the 11th. Will it be a waste of money to continue with these plans ?

Either way we’re here in South Florida East Boca Raton 45 minutes out of Miami with that being said we’re just gonna do a food shop get some extra supplies because I have a feeling it might be a very bumpy season so if it hits us great and if it doesn’t Then it doesn’t move onto the nex denis
Hoping the weather changes Saturday got plans outdoors to go swimming at the lagoon 😬
Lots of rain coming....
Ugh. Teachers heading back to work so we will be driving in it Monday it sounds like.
🙄 turn on your wipers. You’ll be fine
I’m sure we will be. Hate driving in it. These afternoon storms have been nice being at home.
is this a rant? She’s making a simple statement about rain putting an extra damper on going back to work lol
thanks! I feel like I’m being attacked! I know a lot of us who live here hate driving in it because of the extra accidents there always are. Love being home when it rains. Cuddle weather, lol
ehhh not for South Tampa where it floods with a normal afternoon storm 😭
yes. Flooding is a serious problem.

yesssss! My old school (Currently where my daughters are still going) floods REALLY bad. I'm talking hallways flooding in the grade level pods 😭 I'm at a new school this year which is thankfully a new build so it's slanted up (Adum in ST) but I'm worried about my fellow teachers over there and having to deal with it 😞

oh wow, that’s pretty bad. Our school floods on the outside pretty badly but thankfully, none of the buildings so far flood. I’m at a school that’s very very old and they didn’t really think about drainage I don’t think back then. Good luck at your new school!

Thank you for keeping us informed. Was hoping whatever it becomes want coming our way but it’s gonna do, what it’s gonna do. Hope it doesn’t interfere with our flight on Wednesday. Don’t want to miss my cruise!
Thanks for always keeping us informed
I bought tickets to Busch Gardens for August 5th for my daughters birthday.
most theme parks have a rainy day policy. I'd check out what theirs is. Happy soon to be birthday!
Fancy seeing you here haha
I already checked. They do. Lol
lol. Stalker!
Thank you.. teachers head back to school Monday!
I want that Hoodie
So glad we have you. Thanks!!!
We leave on a cruise to the Bahamas out of Miami on Monday August 5th. Hoping it is okay!!!
You’re awesome, thank you for always being there for us!
Looks like we are all going to share the love with this one.
Thought that was Nik Saben.
Thanks Denis! Appreciate yr updates..bless you.
Get the Ark ready!!!!!!
Thank you Denis Phillips! Following from the other side of the globe, hoping our flight is good to land back home in Tampa late Sunday night 🙃
Thank you Denis for the up date
Love you Denis Phillips Thank You Very Much ✋️👍👊
Thanks Denis for keeping us informed.

Thanks Big D
I appreciate you being a newly transplant here 2 years August.
So appreciate you
Thanks so much for keeping us advised
I like your hoodie!
Thank you Denis Phillips. I look to you for expert advice on all of these storms every year!
Thank you, Denis!
Email me when you get to "Rule #-7" !
Thanks for the update.
Rule #7 😎
Thank you! You’re the best
Thanks for the update!
Thanks for the updates !
So Miami will get hit.
Auburndale?
Why is it the forecasts are usually not accurate for the NEXT day?
Rule #7
good stuff
Oh no. More south Florida flooding. Thanks for keeping us informed.
Thanks Denis. Always on the Job.
I got warehouses full of toilet paper 🧻. Hmu. It's that x2 ply goooooood goood.
Will this system affect any FLTS Flying in and out of TPA or MCO
So probably no Busch Gardens on Monday? 😞😅🫠
that was my plans as well for my daughter's birthday.
Is it named yet?
No
thank you.
Yay drain the pool a few inches for like the the 20th f ing time this summer. To much rain already & now more.
Nick Saban?
wellllll well well
as of rn looking alllllright
we shall see 😂😂 it always tends to take a turn. A SHARP ONE 😂😂
As usual, thanks for keeping us On Track 👣 👍

Can you please stop talking to us like we just moved here from insert-random-city-in-NJ-or-NY? I’m a native Floridian, and your broadcasts compare
to mansplaining how to pump gas or something like that (I hear they don’t pump their own gas in NJ).
that was unecessary......
Can you please not assume that you are the only person he's talking to? 😁
I’m not assuming anything of the sort, but I’ve been watching him for years, and his reporting has changed.
Fair enough. Maybe because he has a wider audience now? I've noticed a change in questions.
You know that you can just not watch like it's not compulsory right? No one made you come here to watch this
Thank you
Thanks. 🙂 My garden can use some rain.
fyi ✌️
You call yourself a weatherman time people not to worry our tax dollars at work very disappointing
Rule #8
great😔
It’s gonna go to Texas, watch. Lol
Thank you Denis, your the best
Thank you Denis!
Hi Denis Phillips thank you 🙏 for keeping us posted 💜

Denis Phillips recently found you & really like your forecasting. No hype just the facts & of course rule #7.
Thanks from Louisiana
also in Louisiana and watching this blob inch west has me shaking in my boots!
Rule #7…Don’t freak out! It’s nothing to worry about at this point. BTW I see your in BR, I’m about 35 miles north of you in East Feliciana Parish.

well, hey Neighbor! The only reason I’m freaking out is because mid May, two weeks after moving into our newly renovated house, a freak storm rolled through and took two trees down into our house and we are just getting finished with the rebuild and fighting with insurance. The thought of another storm coming through makes me sick to my stomach and we have a LONG season to go. But, those trees are gone now, and our house is stronger than ever, so I have to keep the faith!
oh no, sorry to hear that. I understand now why you are freaking. Faith over Fear!!!
Thank you
Thank you !!
Thank you, Dennis
Oh boy
Thank-you!🤎
Thank you, Denis!
Thanks
Thanks for updates
Thank you ☺️
Thank you, Sir!!
Thanks 😊

Thank you D!!!!
